commit_scope: Heal the deployed production-manifest attention route after Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27964943784 showed the kernel-router container serving /api/attention/kernel-runtime but timing out every local and public probe. The route now reports bounded scalar fanout observation data and the next candidate without recursively serializing the live fanout path history.

commands: direct local form-kernel-rust.exe serve probe for GET /api/attention/kernel-runtime
local_validation.notes: The direct native server probe loaded deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk through the release kernel, returned HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router native-kernel, native_route_count 45, observed_fanout_path_count present, and fanout_path_counts as an empty bounded list. The broader kernel_front_door_local_preflight.sh could not run unchanged on this Windows host because the available Bash lacks lsof; the direct native server probe covered the failing route shape without changing repo code.

ci_validation.notes: CI and Hostinger Auto Deploy will run after this follow-up PR merges.

deploy_validation.notes: Before this fix, public /api/health already reported deployed_sha b434d9254e7e096453d0aba9df83d4a42735fa2c and /api/ready plus /api/utils/kernel_status returned native-kernel. During deploy, /api/attention/kernel-runtime timed out with zero bytes and the kernel-router container was unhealthy; after startup settled, the same route answered 200 but returned a 33140 byte body with the full fanout_path_counts history. The fixed local route returned the same attention contract in 407 bytes with bounded fanout_path_counts. After merge, Hostinger deploy should roll the bounded attention route and the public kernel canary should pass during startup.

phase_gate.reason: Local native proof passed; merge, deploy, and public no-header /api/attention/kernel-runtime verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27964943784 failed in Roll forward VPS because the kernel-router listener at /api/attention/kernel-runtime did not accept local HTTP within 90 seconds.

The same run's logs showed the production manifest compiled and listed ANY /api/attention/kernel-runtime as a native route, while the kernel-router container stayed unhealthy and public curls timed out during startup.

A later public probe at deployed_sha b434d9254e7e096453d0aba9df83d4a42735fa2c returned HTTP 200 from /api/attention/kernel-runtime but produced a 33140 byte body containing hundreds of fanout_path_counts rows.

The bounded route removes the handler's read of __router_observation__.fanout_path_counts, adds observed_fanout_path_count, keeps next_bml_candidate, and returns fanout_path_counts as an empty bounded list.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The production-manifest kernel-router should become healthy because /api/attention/kernel-runtime returns bounded JSON instead of recursively serializing unbounded fanout path history.
test_flows: local release kernel serves /api/attention/kernel-runtime with X-Form-Router native-kernel and bounded fanout_path_counts.
static deploy-path check pins the bounded attention route source shape so unbounded fanout_path_counts expansion cannot return silently.
post-merge deploy should complete Roll forward VPS and public verification should observe /api/attention/kernel-runtime as native-kernel.
